Motor_Init.vi
nodes.rationale: No global objects; init in startup state only to fix Python's module-level side effects.

nodes.label: Motor_CheckLimits.vi
nodes.rationale: Reject user inputs moving motor more than 50,000 steps and implement serial port reset to prevent controller unresponsiveness on limit switches.

nodes.label: SMU_Close.vi
nodes.rationale: Always include 100ms delay between serial close/open to prevent port lockups.

nodes.label: ManualMove.vi
nodes.rationale: Always read back actual steps after move to prevent missing position updates in contact_point_move.

nodes.label: Concentric Circles Patterning Path & Liftoff Signals Chart
Stepping Smoothness at 0.2 µm Resolution
nodes.rationale: Close-up view of the drawn line confirming the 0.2 micron step resolution of the stage does not introduce visible staircase artifacts.

nodes.label: Concentric Ghost Circle Trace
nodes.rationale: Close-up showing a faint concentric dotted track inside the main path, which likely is a result of prior failed attempts or calibration residuals.

nodes.label: Project History: Holmarc Stage Calibration & Circle Distortion Resolution
Circle Distortion
nodes.rationale: Flat lines at cardinal points (axes reversal extremes) during slow path velocity plotting. Disproved mechanical backlash as main cause, found serial timing latency secondary.

nodes.label: Firmware Speed Bands Bug
nodes.rationale: Controller firmware systematically overrides commanded speed ranges (16-30 steps/s and 123-244 steps/s) to run up to 12x faster, disrupting coordinated circular interpolation.

nodes.label: Serial State Parser Collision
nodes.rationale: The single-axis stepper controller's serial ISR parser collides by checking speed parameter bytes against global command codes (like acceleration/deceleration), causing configurations to abort.

nodes.label: Proportional Speed Scaling
nodes.rationale: Scaling both axis speeds by the same factor k preserves coordinate synchronization and vector slope angles, avoiding warping circle geometry.

nodes.label: Fine-Grained Calibration
nodes.rationale: A 1-step increment sweep from 10 to 250 steps/s over a safe 20 um offset identified exact boundaries of bad bands and minimized necessary scaling factor deviation to 1-2%.

nodes.label: Empirical Speed Blacklist
nodes.rationale: Determines exact ranges [16, 30] and [123, 244] to bypass speed parser collision using is_bad_speed.

nodes.label: Parameter Safety in Parsers
nodes.rationale: Takeaway: Serial parsers must use strict state tracking (counting expected parameter bytes) rather than globally intercepting all incoming bytes as potential commands.

nodes.label: Coordinated Motion Workarounds
nodes.rationale: Takeaway: In decoupled axis systems, speed changes must be proportional across all axes to maintain trajectory angles.
